Interface OpenApi2xDocument

All Superinterfaces:
Document, Node, OpenApiDocument, Visitable
All Known Subinterfaces:
OpenApi20Document
All Known Implementing Classes:
OpenApi20DocumentImpl
public interface OpenApi2xDocument extends OpenApiDocument
